title: Ad Astra Plus
description: This modpack contains some of the best performance and Ad Astra Add ones out there! I hope you enjoy!
body:
This modpack has some of the best performance and Ad Astra addons out there. Enjoy an amazing adventure with new planets, mobs and blocks. With optimal performance with hours of work and studying, we can bring you some amazing performance while having fun. With ad astra, study the horizon and go beyond the hemisphere while exploring deep space. Go to the moon, make a rocketship, drive in a rover at a distant world. You could capture aliens or visit a world that may or may not exist. With over 10 worlds to explore, and experiment with different blocks and see what they do. And much more!

**Mod List**. Note all mods on the list are for the newest version modpack. And there may be missing mods becuase it was done by hand. Dont use it as a sourse :)
